text: Rest now. The world will wait for you, and everything pressing today will still be there tomorrow. Your body keeps score of every hour you push past what it needs, so give it what it's asking for. Close the laptop, silence the notifications, let the afternoon or evening belong to you alone. Sleep is not laziness. It is maintenance, recovery, the quiet work your mind does when you finally stop demanding things of it. You will be sharper, kinder, more yourself after rest. Take the break. You have earned it.
